title: Conjecture 1 (Caccetta–Häggkvist)
statement_text: Let $n, k$ be positive integers, and let $G$ be a simple digraph on $n$ vertices with $\delta^+(v) \geq k$ for all $v \in V(G)$. Then $G$ contains a directed cycle of length at most $\lceil n/k \rceil$.
context_text: The Caccetta–Häggkvist conjecture is a central open problem on short directed cycles in digraphs with prescribed minimum out-degree. It is the direct precursor and motivation for Aharoni's rainbow generalization (Conjecture 2). Existing approximate results toward it—in particular Shen's bound (Theorem 6)—are used as tools in the proofs of the paper.
paper_contribution: No new direct progress on Conjecture 1 is claimed; existing approximate results for it are applied as ingredients in the proof of the rainbow analogue.
notes: PDF source — the strict inequality $\delta^+(v) > k$ in the extracted text is likely a rendering artefact for $\delta^+(v) \geq k$; statement corrected to the standard formulation.
paper_title: Further approximations for Aharoni's rainbow generalization of the Caccetta-Häggkvist conjecture

title: Conjecture 2 (Aharoni's Rainbow Generalization of the Caccetta–Häggkvist Conjecture)
statement_text: Let $n, k$ be positive integers, and let $G$ be a simple graph on $n$ vertices. Let $b$ be a coloring of the edges of $G$ with $n$ color classes of size at least $k$. Then $G$ has rainbow girth at most $\lceil n/k \rceil$.
context_text: Aharoni proposed this rainbow analogue of the Caccetta–Häggkvist conjecture. Prior work (Conjecture 2 was proved for $k=2$; Hompe–Spirkl–Pelikánová–Pokornà showed it holds when every color class has size at least $301k\log k$). The present paper is entirely centered on closing the gap between the $\Omega(k\log k)$ bound and Aharoni's conjectured $k$.
paper_contribution: Proves Conjecture 2 under the relaxed assumption that each color class has size at least $ck$ for the explicit constant $c = 10^{11}$, improving the previously known $\Omega(k\log k)$ threshold to $\Omega(k)$ and thus achieving a result only a constant factor from the conjecture.
paper_title: Further approximations for Aharoni's rainbow generalization of the Caccetta-Häggkvist conjecture
